MINI MINUTES: Appearances: richard frischer, esq., 415.497-4529, for plaintiffs michael tarbox et al.
david chin, esq., 510.521.0012, for defendants sergey yusupov and alexander yusupov.

RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS SERGEY YUSUPOV, ALXANDER YUSUPOV'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is Denied. Plaintiff has pled sufficient facts supporting the punitive damages allegations. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
